benchmarkLensHierarchy.label: Momentum
benchmarkLensHierarchy.definition: Whether the brand improved significantly versus the prior period, tested at 95% confidence where source data is available.
benchmarkLensHierarchy.productRule: Momentum is the trajectory verdict and must not be hidden behind category index or brand scale.
benchmarkLensHierarchy.sourceContext: Deck lens: MOMENTUM vs. prior period.

benchmarkLensHierarchy.label: Ahead/Behind
benchmarkLensHierarchy.definition: Whether the brand is in the top third versus same size/life-stage peers.
benchmarkLensHierarchy.productRule: Ahead/Behind is a size-adjusted strength check, not opportunity sizing and not the final verdict by itself.

benchmarkLensHierarchy.label: vs. Category
benchmarkLensHierarchy.definition: How the brand indexes versus the whole category.
benchmarkLensHierarchy.productRule: Category index is descriptive context and cannot prove brand health by itself.

ambitionRead.principle: The deck frames ambition around brands being Ahead and in Momentum in anchor markets.
ambitionRead.productTranslation: A high category index is not the ambition by itself; the system should ask whether the brand is both size-adjusted Ahead and building Momentum.

blockWhen: Category index is the only positive proof.
Any core outcome KPI is declining.
Multiple core metrics are Not Ahead.
Pricing Power / Perceived Value or Different is Not Ahead for a large/category-leading brand.
strengthLanguagePolicy.requiredQualifierWhenBlocked: Use qualified language such as large/category-leading but vulnerable, not simply strong.
allowedOnlyWhen: Momentum is not declining across core outcome KPIs.
Ahead/Behind does not materially undermine the profile.
Driver profile supports the outcome read.
Source posture and caveats are visible.

typologyPolicy.productRule: Source typology may be shown only as source context / source-methodology context, and only when the user explicitly asks about source typology. It must not become the product diagnosis, default readout language, or headline verdict.
typologyPolicy.blockedUse: Do not use source typology labels as the final product verdict.

Demand Power.read: Demand Power pressure should be diagnosed through Meaningful and Salient first, then Different.

Pricing Power.read: Pricing Power / Perceived Value pressure should be diagnosed through Meaningful and Different first.

notValidFor: Causal proof of willingness to pay
pricingPowerPolicy.productRule: Use Perceived Value in product-facing language while preserving Pricing Power as source lineage.

demographicPolicy.productRule: Deck sample context does not equal demographic performance evidence. Segment-specific brand diagnosis requires official BBE demographic cuts with base sizes and movement/significance metadata.

sourceUsePolicy.promotionRequirement: Source owner must approve the underlying BBE export/workbook and metric mapping before canonical pilot use.
